page_content: HNUH368T U.S. Diplomacy and Policymaking (3 Credits) An examination of questions and issues in the practice of contemporary diplomacy and policy-making. Guest lecturers drawn from Washington policy-making and foreign service communities will visit class and participate in discussion. Cross-listed with: FGSM360. Restriction: Must be in the Global Fellows Program; and permission of instructor. Credit Only Granted for: HNIUH368T or FGSM360.
